flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Cayuga County Community College fell 37% between 2006 and 2009 (29.8% → 18.8%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 27% at Cayuga County Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.1k vs 1.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Cayuga County Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($6.3k → $7.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Cayuga County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.9% → 0.0%).
